bird.name: Brown mesite
bird.summary: The brown mesite (Mesitornis unicolor) is a ground-dwelling bird endemic to Madagascar. It is one of three species in the mesite family or…

relations.subject: Brown mesite
relations.evidence: The population of this species is patchily distributed, and is vulnerable for preferring lower elevation forests which are under the greatest pressure from human disturbance
relations.object_summary: 旅游、施工和高频活动影响繁殖或觅食。

relations.subject: Brown mesite
relations.evidence: It is suspected that the population is rapidly declining because of predation by dogs, rats and by hunting
relations.object_summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。

relations.subject: Brown mesite
relations.evidence: Its forests are also threatened by logging and subsistence agriculture
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。
